name: psycogenerative automedicine

phase_0.boundary_condition: The closed loop of self-awareness and autobiographical memory that contains the observing ego and the integrated self-narrative

VINIT.justification: The unstructured psychic material and raw symptom before any therapeutic intervention or self-observation occurs

TANCH.justification: The integrated, coherent self-state that serves as the terminal anchor and closed boundary of psychological coherence

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism generating a new cognitive framework or narrative direction toward healing and resolution

AREV.justification: Reverse morphism descending into the subconscious to retrieve the root affective memory or repressed material

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of cognitive behavioral steps and insights into a cohesive, actionable self-narrative

IMSCRIB.justification: Self-modeling awareness that recognizes the system as both the patient experiencing the symptom and the physician administering the cure

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the presenting psychological complex into two distinct branches: the cognitive schema (T-arm) and the affective emotion (F-arm)

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the processed cognitive schema and affective emotion branches back into a unified, healed self-narrative

EVALT.justification: Affirmative evaluation indicating symptom relief, schema alignment, and successful application of the therapeutic reframe

EVALF.justification: Negative evaluation indicating persistent dissonance, distress from raw affective retrieval, or failure of the reframe to alleviate the symptom

ENGAGR.justification: Holding contradictory psychological states simultaneously without resolution, such as experiencing grief and acceptance, or recognizing oneself as both broken and whole

IFIX.justification: Permanent, irreversible encoding of the therapeutic insight and new schema into long-term episodic and semantic memory

phase_2.fuse_result: Integrated psychological complex (the healed, unified self-narrative)

phase_3.void_description: Unstructured psychic noise, pre-reflective dysregulation, the raw unexamined symptom before self-modeling
phase_3.true_description: Cognitive resonance, symptom relief, the successful application and internalization of the therapeutic reframe
phase_3.false_description: Cognitive dissonance, therapeutic resistance, the failure of the reframe to alleviate distress or the pain of raw affective retrieval
phase_3.both_description: Dialectical holding, the simultaneous experience of contradictory emotions or beliefs (e.g., pain and healing) without collapsing into dissonance

steps.domain_action: Initialize the baseline psychological dysregulation and unstructured psychic material
The observing ego activates, recognizing the dysregulation as its own state and establishing self-modeling awareness
Bifurcate the presenting psychological complex into the cognitive schema branch (T-arm) and the affective emotion branch (F-arm)
Generate a forward-looking therapeutic reframe and new cognitive narrative along the T-arm
Evaluate the cognitive reframe along the T-arm, confirming cognitive resonance and symptom relief
Descend into the subconscious along the F-arm to retrieve the root affective memory or repressed material
Evaluate the raw affective retrieval along the F-arm, registering the distress and therapeutic resistance
Enter the B-state by holding the dialectical paradice of the retrieved affective pain and the new cognitive reframe simultaneously without resolution
Reintegrate the processed cognitive and affective branches into a unified, coherent self-narrative
Chain the integrated narrative into a sequential therapeutic protocol for ongoing self-regulation
Permanently consolidate the new schema and therapeutic insight into autobiographical memory as an irreversible record
Anchor the system at the homeostatic boundary, achieving the integrated, coherent self-state

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The therapeutic framework (e.g., CBT, psychoanalysis, dialectical behavior therapy) that translates psychological intentions into cognitive operations
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Neural oscillatory synchrony and neurochemical signaling (e.g., serotonin, dopamine, GABA) between the prefrontal cortex and limbic system
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Episodic and semantic autobiographical memory stores, alongside implicit procedural memory for emotional regulation
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Circadian rhythms and ultradian cycles governing cognitive load, emotional processing windows, and neuroplasticity
phase_5.alfs_store: The foundational core beliefs, early attachment templates, and baseline personality structure

phase_6.cycle_cost: Metabolic energy (glucose) and neurochemical resources consumed during cognitive reappraisal and emotional processing
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Dysregulated, high-entropy psychic state with fragmented schemas and unprocessed affect
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Integrated, low-entropy homeostatic state with a coherent self-narrative and regulated affect
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The cycle converts metabolic energy into structural insight, reducing local psychological entropy via Frobenius-verified self-modeling closure without violating global thermodynamic bounds

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → FSPLIT → AFWD → EVALT → AREV → EVALF → ENGAGR → FFUSE → CLINK → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: psycogenerative automedicine
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 8)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑚  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [5] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [8] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑱  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [9] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑙 → 𐑭  | composition — regime coherence
--   [10] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑱 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [11] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def psycogenerative_automedicine_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize the baseline psychological dysregulation and unstructured psychic ...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The observing ego activates, recognizing the dysregulation as its own state a...)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (Bifurcate the presenting psychological complex into the cognitive schema branch (T-arm) and the affective emotion branch (F-arm)) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Generate a forward-looking therapeutic reframe and new cognitive narrative al...)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Evaluate the cognitive reframe along the T-arm, confirming cognitive resonanc...)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Descend into the subconscious along the F-arm to retrieve the root affective ...)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Evaluate the raw affective retrieval along the F-arm, registering the distres...)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Enter the B-state by holding the dialectical paradice of the retrieved affect...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reintegrate the processed cognitive and affective branches into a unified, coherent self-narrative)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [9] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chain the integrated narrative into a sequential therapeutic protocol for ong...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑱 𐑡)  -- [10] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanently consolidate the new schema and therapeutic insight into autobiogr...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [11] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Anchor the system at the homeostatic boundary, achieving the integrated, cohe...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def psycogenerative_automedicine_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (psycogenerative_automedicine_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def psycogenerative_automedicine_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (psycogenerative_automedicine_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem psycogenerative_automedicine_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
